bugs.title: ListChatSessions missing updatedAt field
bugs.description: ListChatSessions returns 'lastMessageAt' instead of 'updatedAt'. The persona spec and typical API conventions expect an 'updatedAt' timestamp on session objects. The field 'lastMessageAt' serves a similar purpose but the naming inconsistency could confuse clients expecting standard CRUD timestamps.
bugs.expected: Each session should have an 'updatedAt' field

bugs.title: Usage count may not track selection mode messages
bugs.description: Sent 4 SendMessage calls (1 selection + 2 planning + 1 companion) but /api/usage reports used=3. If selection mode messages are intentionally excluded from quota, this is fine but undocumented. If not, one message was not counted.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Chat history persistence is solid. All messages round-tripped correctly through Firestore with no empty content, no role alternation violations, and complete cross-session isolation. Session listing returns all 3 sessions with correct modes and valid timestamps. The 10-day itinerary with 17 items survived trip activation and completion without data loss. Minor issues: session objects use 'lastMessageAt' instead of 'updatedAt', and usage tracking appears to skip selection mode messages.
